summary: Iteration 56: Verified all 4 fixes - (1) Onboarding page input focus fix with focus-visible:bg-slate-800/80, (2) Week start day used in TimesheetsPage from restaurant settings, (3) Timesheet reject button + backend endpoint working, (4) Dashboard auto-refresh changed to 15s.
critical_code_review_comments: StaffOnboarding.js: All 3 inputs (password, confirm password, PIN) have focus-visible:bg-slate-800/80 class for dark theme fix
TimesheetsPage.js line 14: getWeekRange function accepts weekStartDay parameter (default 1 = Monday)
TimesheetsPage.js line 37: weekStartDay state initialized to 1
TimesheetsPage.js line 44-51: useEffect loads week_start_day from /api/restaurants/my business_info
TimesheetsPage.js line 39: getWeekRange called with weekStartDay parameter
TimesheetsPage.js line 114-124: handleReject function prompts for reason and calls timesheetAPI.reject
TimesheetsPage.js line 246-248: Reject button with XCircle icon and data-testid='reject-{staff_id}'
AdminDashboard.js line 114: setInterval(loadAll, 15000) - auto-refresh every 15 seconds
timesheets.py line 149-164: reject_timesheet endpoint marks records as rejected=true and removes lock
api.js line 671-674: timesheetAPI.reject function sends PUT request with staff_id, dates, and reason
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified: (1) Onboarding page inputs have dark theme focus fix - focus-visible:bg-slate-800/80 prevents white background on focus. (2) TimesheetsPage now reads week_start_day from restaurant settings via /api/restaurants/my and passes it to getWeekRange function. (3) Reject button (XCircle icon) visible next to Approve button on TimesheetsPage - calls PUT /api/timesheets/reject which marks records as rejected and removes lock. (4) Dashboard auto-refresh interval changed from 60s to 15s (15000ms). Timesheets page URL is /workforce/timesheets (not /timesheets).

onboarding_focus_fix.evidence: All 3 inputs (password, confirm password, PIN) have focus-visible:bg-slate-800/80 class in StaffOnboarding.js

onboarding_get_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/onboarding/{token} returns 200 with username, business_name, capabilities for valid token

onboarding_complete_endpoint.evidence: POST /api/onboarding/{token}/complete returns 404 for invalid token (correct behavior)

week_start_day_in_timesheets.evidence: TimesheetsPage loads week_start_day from /api/restaurants/my and passes to getWeekRange function

timesheet_reject_endpoint.evidence: PUT /api/timesheets/reject returns 200 and marks records as rejected, removes lock

timesheet_reject_button.evidence: Screenshot shows XCircle reject button next to Approve button for each staff member
